details.message: Moltbot code directory still present at moltbot/ with active Python modules (board.py, sentinel.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py). Scripts referencing moltbot: scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py.

notes: reports/board/ directory was missing and has been created.
Clawdbot/Moltbot references in reports/audit/, reports/daily/, docs/, board/eod/, and MEMORY_BANK_ALPACA.md are excluded per documentation-allowlist policy.
moltbot/ directory and scripts/*.py that import/reference moltbot are flagged as code-level violations.
